creator: edwardc@firebird.org.tw
text:
Due to a very long downtime was occur in Firebird web site and ftp
	site, so we meet unfetchable problem with such link
	(www/ftp.firebird.org.tw)

	Thus, we decide remove the dead link and use biggest mirror site
	(ftp4) instead.

	diff file is enclose, tks!

Fix: 

MAINTAINER=            edwardc@firebird.org.tw--XURlceegFcKbofCpK01EyUZFskLUNVPsRMXeZOQoZRDP960E
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.old        Sun Apr 22 19:52:21 2001
+++ Makefile    Fri Jul 13 09:38:06 2001
@@ -6,9 +6,8 @@
 PORTNAME=              firebird
 PORTVERSION=           3.0R
 CATEGORIES=            chinese net
-MASTER_SITES=          ftp://ftp4.firebird.org.tw/Network/BBS/Firebird/ \
-                       ftp://ftp.firebird.org.tw/pub/Firebird/ \
-                       http://www.firebird.org.tw/download/
+MASTER_SITES=          ftp://ftp4.firebird.org.tw/Network/BBS/Firebird/
+
 DISTNAME=              3.0-RELEASE
